title: The 98th Academy Awards | 2026 - Official Oscars
text: The 98th Academy Awards ceremony took place on March 15, 2026 at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles, hosted by Conan O'Brien. The ceremony honored films released between 2024 and 2025. In the Best Production Design category, Frankenstein won with production designers Tamara Deverell and Shane Vieau. The film also won in Makeup and Hairstyling and Costume Design categories. AMPAS members voted on the Oscar winners between February 26 and March 5, 2026. The official Academy Awards website provides the complete list of nominees and winners across all categories.
